channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Researchers unearth Southeast Asia's largest dinosaur
item.description: Called the 'last titan' of Thailand, this sauropod herbivore dates from the late Early Cretaceous period.

item.title: LA-area mayor acted as an agent for China, experts say
item.description: Eileen Wang, former mayor of Arcadia, agreed to plead guilty to acting as an illegal foreign agent of China.

item.title: Boeing ordered to pay $49.5 million to family of 737 MAX crash victim
item.description: A federal jury in Chicago awarded $49.5 million to the family of Samya Stumo, who died in the second Boeing 737 MAX crash.

item.title: Trump meets Xi as security expert says China now faces U.S. as a peer
item.description: Former national security official Rush Doshi says Trump's tariffs on Chinese goods sparked a clash that China won.
